name: I missed some work due to work-related dermatitis. How do I prove lost wages in Utah?

mainEntity.name: I missed some work due to work-related dermatitis. How do I prove lost wages in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pay stubs, employer letter, medical tie to illness for 2/3 wages.[6][7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Submit pay stubs, tax records, employer letter confirming absence and pay rate.[7] Link medically to occupational illness.[1] Key factors: (1) Covers 2/3 average weekly wage; (2) From injury date; (3) Permanent loss adds disability.[6][7] Track all missed days, doctor notes; file promptly.[6] Evidence strengthens approval.

description: Pay stubs, employer letter, medical tie to illness for 2/3 wages.[6][7]
